reviews.review_title: Best skate game in the Word
reviews.review_description: Is the best game and is cheap 20$ to do cool easy tricks with friends and mod maps mod skins mod clothing, and can see people mods is really cool is fun time playing, and also can do every trick in the game grabs and is not even done yet, is like early access is literally skate 4 but vr best game my opinion.

As a skater who’s broken one too many bones, Virtual Skate satisfies the urge to skate without paying the price.

The developers continue to improve the game. They’re constantly adding features, refining mechanics, and listening to feedback. I’m still playing on a Quest 2, and I appreciate that they continue to support it.

The modding community is another huge plus. The variety of maps, gear, and custom content adds replayability.

I don’t know the first thing about game development, but one feature I’d love to see someday is some kind of trick recognition that displays trick names as you land them. Maybe that’s harder to implement than it sounds.

the control in this game is NEXT LEVEL compared to vr skater. I really like the amount of freedom with how you can do all of your tricks and I love the fact that this game has a built in camera recorder so you can record all of your clips in an entirely different way. The mod io intergration is great to so you can download all of your favourite skate spots and play them in Virtual reality. I give this game a 10/10 I cant wait for more updates

This game literally got me back on vr it is the best game i ever played if im being honest and if your thinking about getting this game do it. it is such a good game the physics are a 10/10 the graphics are a 10/10 multiplayer1000000/10 and the community 100000000/10 and they have in game mods thats literally the cherry on top and their in game mods are a 20/10 but overall game is 10/10 im telling you even if you dont know how to skate its still worth it because of how easy this game if to learn also cannot wait for this update coming out!!❤️‍🩹❤️‍🩹

This is the best skating game to date I've always wanted to skate and this makes me feel like I can do more than cruize all though the visuals could use a bit of work along with the manual system but overall it's worth your money

reviews.review_title: This game is an undiscovered GEM.
reviews.review_description: I love this game so much, I don’t get bored of it because there’s infinite amounts of things you can do and learn, even if you don’t skate in real life like I do. This game is supported by Mod io so you can download and even create cool custom mod maps, like maps from other skate games or cool customisable things to put on your skateboard! The game is in early access too, so there’s even more things to come. 10/10 game, highly recommend buying

I don’t skate in real life so this game brings a whole new experience to the table for me, and I am absolutely having a blast! Many aesthetics for the boards and player, mod support and amazing physics, all around top tier!
This is the best game on the vr, if you are a big fan of skating, you would love this. You can play online and meet other skaters, for example your friends, 5 STARS

reviews.review_title: Favourite skate sim on any platform
reviews.review_description: As the title says, this game is already my favorite skating game/sim on any platform. The accuracy you can achieve with full 6DOF motion control is insane. And being able to physically film lines with a handheld camera is sick. it’s so fun being able to actually spin in real life to do rotation tricks. On top of that, a stats menu, player customisation, multiplayer and mod browser in game. Also the dev is really transparent and actively communicating and updating the game frequently. I honestly think it’s a steal for its price

reviews.review_title: This is the best skate game on vr
reviews.review_description: This game is the best skategame on vr because every trick and grind you do feels realistic. You also have mods for skate 2 and skate 3 skateparks that bring back old memories. This game is truly amazing

Ok so graphically it's not the best, but the gameplay loop, intuitive controls, multiplayer, mod maps (including skate and real life locations) and the tough as nails kasso (great Japanese skate show on YouTube) like tracks make this the go to skate experience 

You can even get a mod to ride the hover board from back to the future!
Five stars absolutely best skateboarding Sim ever made, just buy it that's all I got to say

reviews.review_title: Awesome skate game and a must buy!!
reviews.review_description:
I’ve skated from the age 12 to 21 then took a break for a few years and when I was 36 i started skating again.
I launched this game and whent to the training facility and in my 1st session playing I was so hooked by how the game feels that I played it for 90min straight.

Had Some issues with a glitch in the game that made the game unplayable for me but after a small chat on the official discord server the admins gave me a way on how to fix the glitch and now everything works perfect again.

This game is a must buy for every skater. It feels and plays really great and there are loads of community maps. If you experience any issues with the game then just join the Discord server, ask for help and they wil help you super fast. Keep up the good work devs
Plays more like Skate 2 vs a Session kinda game, its very easy to get good enough to learn all kinds of tricks.

I can believe how realistic this game is i was scrolling through the meta quests store because there was an any decent games anymore and I saw this game I watch a trailer and it was pretty good so I bought it and I loved it
I would enjoy the game more if their was a hands mode wear your hands are your feet  like goriler tag

This game is really good it has a good community and the mods are really good and I love the actual gameplay, it’s a lot better than the other skate game. And I love the mechanics it all works out really well with using your hands for tricks. But this game would be like a 10/5 if I could I love this game a lot. And I would recommend this to anybody who likes/loves skating!

The over all feel of completing tricks and lines u could never do in real life is amazing everytime, and the community getting to play games of S.K.A.T.E together is so fun. If ur thinking of getting this game just do it.
Probably the closest thing to skateboarding that has ever existed. Who knew I could jump a 12 stair
When I bought it I thought it was going to be horrible but it was great I loved it from the first 5 minutes of playing 100000/10 worth the money get now
Great game but I was that there could be more maps that the devs made instead of mods.

reviews.review_title: So good, 10/10, but found a speed glitch
reviews.review_description: It really matches the feeling of skateboarding, and it is so smooth and satisfying to do tricks. Best vr game of the year. With that being said however, I did find a speed glitch. I don’t know really how this speed glitch works, I did it by accident. If there is a discord, I’ll post the footage, and you can try and decipher how it works. I think it is similar to the skate 3 glitch, but I don’t know.
mechanics are at their peak and the community is the absolute best, people in this game are actually funny and not annoying.

The community and owner are the nicest Devs I've ever met and the amount of customisation and maps are great this game is alot funner with friends and with chill people you meet in game.
Can't wait to see more from this game
The mods are nice because there are maps decks trucks wheels skins cloths and way to manny skins
Not even joking this is the best game I’ve ever played on vr
If your looking for a fun way to keep doing skateboarding at anytime, any season, then definitely give this a try, and especially if you have fellow brothas that wanna shred!!!!
Goated game

reviews.review_title: Doesn't let me join the game
reviews.review_description: I've tried everything

developer_response.body: Hey Jack.crazy, sorry for the trouble, which issue are you having? Do you mean it won't let you join online games? Or won't let you play at all? We JUST pushed a patch fixing a number of bugs, like right after you left this, please let me know if it fixed any of your issues. Also, for more help, join our discord and I'll do whatever I can to get you in game. https://www.virtualskategame.com/discord

reviews.review_description: When I first started playing this it was amazing because of the tricks I could do but when some one said that there were modded maps I tried to put my email in but I wouldn’t let me so I was stuck with the same two maps and I think that the devs should add a mega ramp at the start for were you pick the two maps and a lot of the community is a bit toxic would recommend if you want to get bullied by a 9 year old

reviews.review_title: Get this instead of VR Skater
reviews.review_description:
If you're in between this game and VR Skater... choose this game. I was on the fence for a while so I just got this game and I think its the best decision ive made. Ill give a nice easy list...

Graphics:
8/10

Physics:
10/10

Community:
9/10

Polish:
9/10

Difficulty:
3/10

Fun:
10/10

Fluidity:
9.5/10

Configuration Settings:
10/10

Mods:
8.5/10

Overall Rating:
10/10
Edit: Good game, just a minor glitch that is easily fixable.

developer_response.body: Hey sorry about that, there is a known bug that puts you into the floor, in game fix is to slide the Ride Height slider in the settings to the right, it'll fix it permanently.  I'll be patching it asap. Sorry for the trouble.

reviews.review_description: As someone who has no one to skate with this is amazing. Few tweaks won’t hurt but when you play for awhile you can’t stop. Really addicting. There’s even mod maps so you never get bored. Recommend spending the money for it if you really like skating or not. Can’t get bored of it that’s why it’s a 5 stars

Virtual skate is wayyy beyond a “skateboarding game.” It very closely emulates the experience of real skateboarding with its physics based controls that give you 100% freedom on how your tricks look. As a skateboarder who had to give up the sport due to the risk of injury, this game actually scratches that skateboarding itch for me. I also want to mention that the Developers behind this game are very passionate and transparent. If you join the games discord, the Devs along with the community will answer any questions you have. If you are a skateboarder, a retired skateboarder, or have any interest in the sport, then this game is a MUST buy.
So I love this game awesome mods and tricks but I can't figure out how to record on the in game camera other then that this is a MUST BUY

developer_response.body: If you open the replay mode (click right stick in, move stick to the left), you can press B at any time to get the help menu. But the first you'll want to do is rewind time by holding the left trigger. Then you just point the camera and press A to start recording. You can follow your skater by holding the right grip when pointing at him. And you can zoom by holding left grip and pulling your left controller closer or further from the camera. Hope that helps!

reviews.review_description: As someone who has skated for a while and have met skaters from the tony hawk games it is super realistic.If you are hesitating about buying this game don’t, just buy it.
This game is absolutely amazing so much potential and honestly i luv the way it feels the graphics on standalone are very nice… for standalone thanks for making a great game i truly enjoy it

I like it I 
get a refund

reviews.review_title: A game changing VR experience for all
reviews.review_description: From the casual let’s play to the most experienced rider, this VR experience will change the way you look at gaming. The experience is what you make it. Ride big air solo or street with friends. You are the story mode! Meet up to session new spots or browse other sessions to meet new skaters! The update just before 2026 has only made the game feel more realistic than ever! An incredible community on Discord and an involved dev always bringing the game to new heights. Just like real life skating you need to understand the fundamentals & practice if you want to get dialed in!

reviews.review_title: Been playing for a week and it’s great.
reviews.review_description: I bought this game when it was $19.99 and I’ve been playing for over￼ a week and it’s amazing. It takes some time to get tricks down, maybe like a couple days but after it’s smooth sailing. The developers definitely care about the game more than others and the mod io makes it so you never get bored.

Just bought this game for my son over Christmas and he is loving it! My son had a bit of a hard time with the controls to start but that is expected and he quickly caught on when some helpful people in the game gave him some tips which today I heard him passing on to someone new in the game so the community seems nice and the discord was very helpful as well. I came to find that the creator (or one of) is an active skater (as we are) and it gives me the impression they know what is important for skaters in a skating game. Also maybe due to recent updates but the mod menu worked fine for us and was easy to use and didn't negatively affect gameplay. All in all a great game and one I would wholeheartedly spend money on addons to keep the game progression going.

Don’t like the game. Just got it spent about 30 minutes figuring it out and I want my money back. Big time don’t recommend.
Update: nvm this game is good but mods dont work. 4 stars

developer_response.body: If you paused and hit the Mod Browser button, and was able to login before but can't now, it's a known modio plugin bug that we're attempting to fix. But reinstalling, or clearing app data can often fix it. Sorry for the inconvenience. Also got a chuckle out of the edit lol, it's a little frustrating at first cause it takes a second for it to click but once it does you stop flailing and start landing wild tricks and it really starts to feel great imo, I'm super biased but ask anyone in the community. Appreciate the updated review! Jump in our discord if you haven't to get all the latest and see what everyone in the community is up to.

reviews.review_description: This is a PERFECT vr skating game. I love everything but the knew update that added legs. I personally don’t enjoy it as it blocks half my view. I think an option to change you legs from the new to old ones would be nice.

developer_response.body: Will probably add the option soon. Also we'll likely add a riding height slider so his legs aren't so compressed if you've been having that get in the way (avatar looking too crouched).

reviews.review_description: They just had an update which you can download mods and get a custom board or clothes and getting mods isn't hard at all unless you dont have a Gmail, but this Is the best vr skateboarding game ever made
so immersive, feels like i am skating irl, AND THE MODS ARE AMAZING

Going from Tony Hawk to Skate to Sxl and Session, we finally have arrived to the next step up in skateboarding gaming history. With even more controllability and freedom, this is the truest to skateboarding you can get. 

With an already built in mod manager, several new game modes not seen in any other skate games, filming mode that puts you in the filmers shoes, stats menu to change how you want to play, it is a no brainer to why I got this game. 

Small bugs but nothing that stops you from having fun and feeling like a pro skater. Thank you to the devs for finally making this a reality 🙏
A must have for skaters! Feels like im skating! Custom mods for maps and skins! Freedom to be creative! YES!

This game is perfect. I love skating and the winter time is perfect for this game indoors that gives the same realistic feel and excitement as real skating, though it is new and has a small development team, it’s future is bright.
I Love it

The game is amazing in every way, this is probably the best possible way you can implement skating in VR it feels amazing to play.

It would be nice to improve the tutorial because it doesn't tell you a lot of important tips.

This game is borderline perfection. The controls are a bit hard to learn, but once you do you’re able to land crazy trick combos. Devs, please keep the roof glitch is Seattle, and also, keep it no micro transactions. The game is good the way it is. If you do add cosmetics, make them unlockable for like doing combos or something. Great game tho.

My mod .iodoesn’t work it keeps saying waiting but it doesn’t load someone said to uninstall the game and reinstall but it doesn’t work how do I fix.

the game is really good tho I really recommend it for anyone who is looking for a fun game.

The game is amazing and I would recommend it for anyone that’s thinking of buying it, I also feel like the developers should try and make a bmx one in the future that would be cool asf but other than that great game and I fw it, it did take me some time to get used to the controls but as long as y’all follow the tutorial and read it thoroughly then you will understand over the time you play.

This is a very fun game. The controls do take some time to get used to and there is quite a bit of jank which its early access so I get it.

Lots of kids trying to “teach me” how to play . Cool gesture but can I just play please?can I just turn multi player off?

Get single player only mode and this review will go to 5 stars.unless I’m missing it,one area does say training but someone always drops in and wants to school me on every mistake I make which is my entire time playing because I can’t be left alone long enough to figure it out on my own.

developer_response.body: Currently the game creates a session for you when you load a map, this is to keep the server population healthy. But you can go to Multiplayer > Sessions > Session Info and hit Leave to skate solo. In the future I'll add a toggle to disable that entirely.

reviews.review_description:
i love this game i really do, but i tried installing some deck, shirt and hat mods and they dont work

otherwise 8/10

This game is sick. Don’t get frustrated and learn the settings and controls to absolutely shred 🤙🤙🤙. Pretty tight lobbies too.  Keep the updates coming and grow this game devs 🤜🤛 Check my gameplay on TikTok @rambrocious

Great physics.
Great graphics.
Great gameplay.
Great menu system.
Awesome community.

If you love the art of Skateboarding, this is the game for you. Show us you can land your first kickflip and join there discord server.

Fantastic work to the dev-team, super happy to see what the future will bring to this already amazing sandbox game!
I bought this game because my friend told me to and i didnt like it and now i cant refund it and im very sad

reviews.review_title: Needs a map with back to back airtime
reviews.review_description: Need a skate park map with half pipes to launch yourself In the air back to back
I love the game so much but when i put in my email word for word it doesn't work when i try to get mods

Very good just need som legs and hairstyl 
Still is good but need more updats
Ok let me get this straight. This game sucks. Controls suck, i can barly push. Dont waste your money.

developer_response.body: Mind sharing what issue you had pushing? Because you just need to hit B or Y to push, it's incredibly simple. You can even increase the push speed in the settings. The game has a high skill ceiling, it takes some time to wrap your mind around it and really get command of the board, similar to real skating, just not as difficult. Perhaps the tutorial could be improved to help convey the controls.

reviews.review_description: A skate sim for VR  with the best controls and immersion, making it feel like you're actually riding a board. It's physics are on the level of Session. or SkaterXL. But you also have the option to play with more unrealistic physics like Skate. It's very customizable, the modding community is great and growing, and the game is still being worked on. Genuinely fantastic experience for an early access title. I would recommend it even if it's current version was the final release. But fortunately, it's as good as it is, AND we have even more content and updates to look forward to.
This game is incredible. As a (begginer) skater irl, I can say it feels and looks very realistic, and truly captures the magic of skating. It is a shame however to see the lack of updates tho.
I love this game it’s really fun the tricks are smooth and all and the modding community is good but I feel like there isn’t enough updates

developer_response.body: We just had a massive update that introduces mod support for custom clothing and boards and a new map with new vert physics!

reviews.review_description: Right now it’s just custom levels, if I could be kicking it as Lego Batman or smthn tho it would be top tier
This game is soo fun. It’s kind of addicting. This is definitely worth the money🧏

I have wanted to get this game since it was announced. It looked great, and there was a ton of support behind it. I have been skateboarding for about 4 months, and it is a super fun hobby. I also remember it releasing, and being super excited to play it. I was a bit discouraged by the price tag, so I held off on buying it, but two days ago I finally decided to try it out. I have to say it was worth every single penny! This game is amazing, from the board control, to the maps, and even the player base. First of all, it feels amazing to perform a three shuv and then manually stomp it. It is so much better than a simple animation triggered by a hand movement. I also love that there are many options for tricks. You can even nollie and do nollie variations of tricks. Another great thing about this game is the maps. There are Two Freeplay maps, one line map, and three course maps already built into the game, but there are also a ton of beautiful mod maps. Lastly, I need to talk about the bugs. This game has its fair share of bugs, such as randomly falling through the floor when respawning, walking and then getting launched up a ramp, and just getting out of the map really easily. But each of these glitches are pretty rare, and they only take away seconds of your gameplay. I also really don't want you to remove the Seattle rooftop glitch, because it is really fun. You could just add some taller buildings next to it so you can't jump off the map. Overall, this really is as close to real skating in VR as it's gonna get. Shout out to FlipAxis for this masterpiece.

Been waiting for this one for months. And it was worth it. Put like 3 hours into the same park trying to hit them buttery clips man. What a freaking game. It does bring about the same amount of challenge as the real thing as far hitting the sweet spots but I am absolutely loving this title. Legit. I'm glad this Is and will always be in my headset. Also everyone laugh at the kid that messed up this games rating because he spent 3 hours in the tutorial. I mean come on bro. Everybody shredding except you ?? Learn the game then rate it. Literally read the instructions your given? It's not that hard. I can just see this kid button mashing in his living room screaming this game sucks 😑 😒  freaking nimrod
DIS JASON APPROVED

I really love the feel of this game. It does take a little getting used to, but once you understand the mechanics more, it really does capture the feeling of skateboarding probably better than any other game ever created. The controls are intuitive and it’s really satisfying to nail tricks that you’ve been trying to do for a while. 

That being said, after you kind of play around with trying to nail tricks and stuff like that, there’s nothing much else to do.

There are some side distractions in the game as different game modes, but I would love the main mode of the game to have more purpose built into it.

I wish the game had some Tony Hawk style things in it. A point system, leaderboard, objectives, horse, collectathons etc. not as over the top as Tony Hawk is because this is more of a simulation, but putting together a 2 to 3 part combo and getting combo points displayed either in front of you, or on a watch on your arm would be awesome. 

In addition it would be cool if the developer gave the ability for users to make custom objectives you can add to levels yourself that can be entered into the game and uploaded to the mods section. 

I think that these things would add longevity to this game. Yeah, skating around and doing tricks is fun, but I feel like if it had objectives, it would make me come back to the game a lot more. I play for about 25 minutes and I’m pretty much done playing without anything meaningful to achieve, or leaderboards to chase.

I know that this game just came out so I’m hoping that these types of things will be added in the future. Right now the mods only have levels which are well done, but I would love to get more features and options to make this not only the best playing skateboarding game ever, but one of the best ones ever made.
I love this game alot i just wish there where actual skateboarding brands for boards and other stuff

I absolutely love this game and you can really tell that the developers took their time making this and spent their time very well and put amazing amount of effort. This game is so addicting and highly enjoyable. I love how the graphics are actually pretty realistic and not cartoony. The controls are so cool and everything about this game. I highly recommend!! Beautiful!

Ima be honest, I had this on my wish list for the longest, and this was WORTH the time, this is fun af realistic physics and the experience is fire, and it JUST came out. This game is crazy fun and enjoyable, dang near stayed on the game all night. I hope and pray they don’t do anything to ruin this game causr this is pure gold

reviews.review_title: Best Skate Game To Ever Exist
reviews.review_description: From the community, to the controls and physics, and the modded maps. This game is amazing. It’s so fun when you get a good group of people and everyone’s just chilling, learning off eachother, play games of S.K.A.T.E. . This is the first game that actually replicates real life skate culture.

This game is so good because it is so easy to play and learn mostly because of the controls all skate games need this.

Oh yeah this game is good because of its multiplayer mode so you can play with friends and play a game of skate (thanks for this game developers this 100% the best skate game ever)

Plus I met one of the developers who made the maps no joke he is really kind this is true as well plus they will add full body soon 

So developers please keep it up pls the game is awesome!!!!!!!!!!!

But developers when is full body coming?
For a 20 dollar game its actually insane I actually feel like im a real skater although I sprained my ankle anyway great game.

This is a dream game for me. If you're a fan of skateboarding you'll almost certainly love this game, it's the best skating simulator I've ever played. Super satisfying to land tricks and being a VR game makes it really intuitive and very fun. Multiplayer to sesh with your friends, mod maps already integrated into the game too, you'll never get bored.
Most true to life skate sim out right now, Insanely addicting especially if you skate irl!! 🫡
first whenever i take my board off my feet it just doesn't go back on like a skateboard

developer_response.body: yeahhh that's a nasty bug that's been hard to track down. Sorry you're having that experience. Normally you can just grab the board and drop it and it'll automatically go to your feet.  Hopefully we can sort that in the next update. Thanks for the review!
